---
title: "MAD345 Mining II(T), Week 01" 
description: "Lecture: Introduction"
date: 2020-10-07T08:00:00-03:00
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float:
        collapsed: true
        smooth_scroll: true
    toc_depth: 3
    fig_caption: yes
    code_folding: show
    number_sections: true

fontsize: 14pt
tags: [mad345_lecturenotes,mad345_lecturenotes_week01]
comments: false
---
```{r , echo=FALSE}
library(kableExtra)
text_tbl <- data.frame(
Date=c("October 7"),
Topic=c("Introduction")
)

kbl(text_tbl,escape = F) %>%
    kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover"), full_width = T)%>%
  column_spec(1, width = "8em")%>%
    column_spec(2, width = "40em")%>%
  row_spec(1, background = "orange", color="black")

```

Dear all,

Textbooks for the MAD345 are as follows: 

1. Ratan Tatiya, 2005, "**Surface and Underground Excavations: Methods, Techniques and Equipment**", Taylor & Francis Group, LLC
2. Peter Darling (Ed.), 2011, "**SME Mining Engineering Handbook, Third Edition**", Society for Mining, Metallurgy, and Exploration (US)
3. Galvin, J.M., 2016, "**Ground Engineering : Principles and Practices for Underground Coal Mining**", Springer

See you tomorrow via Zoom!

`r emo::ji("sun")` GERTUNC `r emo::ji("hammer_and_pick")`
